# Create your own Resort at Home A well-designed swimming pool can turn your backyard into an outdoor oasis. With waterfalls, deck jets and other unique amenities, a pool can serve as a relaxing and inviting resort, right in your own backyard. ![SwimmingPool](https://aquascapesrc.ca/images/aqua_pool_1.jpg) # Create your own Resort at Home A well-designed swimming pool can turn your backyard into an outdoor oasis. With waterfalls, deck jets and other unique amenities, a pool can serve as a relaxing and inviting resort, right in your own backyard. ![SwimmingPool](https://aquascapesrc.ca/images/aqua_pool_2.jpg) # Encourage Family Time You'll make lasting memories as you teach your kids to swim, play with them in the pool, and barbecue by the water. When you build a pool, you're actually creating a fun place for your family to spend time together. ![SwimmingPool](https://aquascapesrc.ca/images/aqua_pool_3.jpg) # Encourage Family Time You'll make lasting memories as you teach your kids to swim, play with them in the pool, and barbecue by the water. When you build a pool, you're actually creating a fun place for your family to spend time together. ![SwimmingPool](https://aquascapesrc.ca/images/aqua_pool_4.jpg) # A Gathering Place for Friends A swimming pool in your backyard gives your kids and their friends a place to play that is both convenient and safe. You can have peace of mind knowing that your children are close by. ![SwimmingPool](https://aquascapesrc.ca/images/aqua_pool_5.jpg) # A Gathering Place for Friends A swimming pool in your backyard gives your kids and their friends a place to play that is both convenient and safe. You can have peace of mind knowing that your children are close by. ![SwimmingPool](https://aquascapesrc.ca/images/aqua_pool_6.jpg) - [See more pools](https://aquascapesrc.ca/slideshow/aquascapes-gallery2.swf "Aquascapes Gallery") - Home - About Us - Services - New Pools - Contact # Aquascapes The perfect choice for homeowners seeking local, experienced and professional pool construction. Serving the Kitchener - Waterloo and surrounding area for over 16 years, we specialize in vinyl-lined residential pool construction, guiding you "from Concept to Completion." The following is a list of our specialized services. | | | | --- | --- | | ![Increased Performance](https://aquascapesrc.ca/images/icon_designs2.png) | ##### Professional Design
Starting from a survey of your yard, we can design a computer-modelled dream pool showing different pool shapes, orientations and landscaping. | * * * | | | | --- | --- | | ![Better Ideas](https://aquascapesrc.ca/images/icon_quality.png) | ##### Quality Assurance
We are a Totally Hayward Dealer, which allows us to offer extended warranties from the largest manufacturer of pool equipment in the world. | * * * | | | | --- | --- | | ![Improved Security](https://aquascapesrc.ca/images/icon_tools2.png) | ##### Continuing Service
We offer complete pool service including: openings, maintenance, cleaning, repair and closings. Our retail store offers water testing and a full line of pool chemicals and equipment. | #### Location D2-550 Parkside Drive, Waterloo, Ontario * * * #### Store Hours **April-October:** 9:00-6:00 Monday-Friday, 9:00-4:00 Saturday **November-March:** 10:00-4:00 Tuesday, Thursday, 10:00-3:00 Saturday * * * #### Contact **Telephone:** (519) 886-8751 **Email:** [info@aquascapesrc.ca](mailto:info@aquascapesrc.ca) # About Us Owner and operator Shaun Tully brings over 25 years of swimming pool construction experience to every project. Working with a team of dedicated staff, we help you to create the pool you want, the right shape, with the right features and the right equipment. We pride ourselves on quality pool service and installation. If you're looking to remodel an existing pool, we do that too! * * * # What Makes Us Unique Quality, care, and the personal touch. You work with the owner to design and build the backyard oasis that is just right for your family. #### Our Mission Our goal is to build high quality pools to suit our clients' needs using the finest materials and methods available. To focus on the quality of each installation, we limit the number of pools we build in a season. We operate with a small, dedicated crew supervised by the owner, who is the head installer, working on-site, every day. # Services Our Waterloo office at 550 Parkside Drive provides us a central location for our pool services and new pool installations. Come in for a water test, pool chemicals or replacement pool parts from Hayward, Jacuzzi, and many others. We also carry a full range of pool equipment including pool cleaners, salt water systems, solar blankets, rollers, safety covers, as well as pumps and filters. * * * #### We Offer: - Seasonal pool openings & closings - Weekly pool maintenance service - Leak location and repair - Liner and coping replacements - Complete reconstruction of older pools - Custom safety cover installations - Pump, filter and heater repairs and replacement - Salt water system installation - Solar heating installation - Water testing #### Our Team Knowledgeable, professional, trained, experienced and friendly. You'll notice our dedicated staff returns to us year after year, giving you the best in service and reliability. # New Pools Each pool installation is unique, and your pool will be designed with the features and accessories needed to create your perfect outdoor oasis. We start by listening to your needs, and develop a full plan for every element of your pool project. Our experience has shown that careful planning in the design stage makes the construction flow smoothly, leading to the timely completion of a well-crafted pool. To construct your new Aquascapes pool, we use only the finest components from the best suppliers in the business. Our pool kits are from Kafko and Hayward supplies our circulation, filtration and control components. Aquascapes is committed to using the latest construction methods and techniques to ensure the highest quality and energy efficiency levels possible. Careful thought goes into equipment selection and plumbing design for each installation to provide the best water quality possible while using the least energy - keeping long-term operating costs low. We pride ourselves on the fact that our past customers continue to refer Aquascapes to their friends and family. Contact us and experience the Aquascapes difference today. #### Testimonials Thank you for building us such a wonderful pool. We are already enjoying it so much. Your work is to be commended. You made it very easy for us. Your neatness, and keeping our yard in great order during the building process is greatly appreciated. Thank you once again, _\- The Kennedy's_ * * * Thank you so much for an awesome job, the summer was great thanks to you and Aquascapes. _\- Jane and Paul_ # Contact Us If you need more information, have any general questions about pool maintenance, or would like to schedule an appointment to talk about a new pool installation - please don't hesitate to contact us. Name Add your name Phone Telephone number Email Add a valid address Message Communicate with us Leave this field blank If you are human Send Message #### Location D2-550 Parkside Drive, Waterloo, Ontario N2L 5V4 * * * #### Store Hours **April-October:** 9:00-6:00 Monday-Friday, 9:00-4:00 Saturday **November-March:** 10:00-4:00 Tuesday, Thursday, 10:00-3:00 Saturday * * * #### Contact **Telephone:** (519) 886-8751 **Email:** [info@aquascapesrc.ca](mailto:info@aquascapesrc.ca) * * * #### Resources **Hayward warranty registration:** [www.haywardcanada.com](http://www.haywardcanada.com/ "Hayward") **Kafko warranty registration:** [www.kafko.com](http://www.kafko.com/ "Kafko") **Poolwerx:** [www.poolwerxfab.com](http://www.poolwerxfab.com/ "Poolwerx") ![Hayward, Kafko, Poolwerx, Rocky's, Poolboss](https://aquascapesrc.ca/images/aquascapes-logos.png) © Aquascapes Recreational Contractors 2009 \| D2-550 Parkside Drive, Waterloo, Ontario N2L 5V4 \| (519) 886-8751 Cancel
data.rawHtml:
Create your own Resort at Home

A well-designed swimming pool can turn your backyard into an outdoor oasis. With waterfalls, deck jets and other unique amenities, a pool can serve as a relaxing and inviting resort, right in your own backyard.

Create your own Resort at Home

A well-designed swimming pool can turn your backyard into an outdoor oasis. With waterfalls, deck jets and other unique amenities, a pool can serve as a relaxing and inviting resort, right in your own backyard.

Encourage Family Time

You'll make lasting memories as you teach your kids to swim, play with them in the pool, and barbecue by the water. When you build a pool, you're actually creating a fun place for your family to spend time together.

Encourage Family Time

You'll make lasting memories as you teach your kids to swim, play with them in the pool, and barbecue by the water. When you build a pool, you're actually creating a fun place for your family to spend time together.

A Gathering Place for Friends

A swimming pool in your backyard gives your kids and their friends a place to play that is both convenient and safe. You can have peace of mind knowing that your children are close by.

A Gathering Place for Friends

A swimming pool in your backyard gives your kids and their friends a place to play that is both convenient and safe. You can have peace of mind knowing that your children are close by.

  • See more pools
  • Home
  • About Us
  • Services
  • New Pools
  • Contact

Aquascapes

The perfect choice for homeowners seeking local, experienced and professional pool construction. Serving the Kitchener - Waterloo and surrounding area for over 16 years, we specialize in vinyl-lined residential pool construction, guiding you "from Concept to Completion." The following is a list of our specialized services.

Professional Design

Starting from a survey of your yard, we can design a computer-modelled dream pool showing different pool shapes, orientations and landscaping.

Quality Assurance

We are a Totally Hayward Dealer, which allows us to offer extended warranties from the largest manufacturer of pool equipment in the world.

Continuing Service

We offer complete pool service including: openings, maintenance, cleaning, repair and closings. Our retail store offers water testing and a full line of pool chemicals and equipment.

Location

D2-550 Parkside Drive, Waterloo, Ontario

Store Hours

April-October: 9:00-6:00 Monday-Friday, 9:00-4:00 Saturday
November-March: 10:00-4:00 Tuesday, Thursday, 10:00-3:00 Saturday

Contact

Telephone: (519) 886-8751
Email: info@aquascapesrc.ca

About Us

Owner and operator Shaun Tully brings over 25 years of swimming pool construction experience to every project. Working with a team of dedicated staff, we help you to create the pool you want, the right shape, with the right features and the right equipment.

We pride ourselves on quality pool service and installation. If you're looking to remodel an existing pool, we do that too!

What Makes Us Unique

Quality, care, and the personal touch. You work with the owner to design and build the backyard oasis that is just right for your family.

Our Mission

Our goal is to build high quality pools to suit our clients' needs using the finest materials and methods available. To focus on the quality of each installation, we limit the number of pools we build in a season. We operate with a small, dedicated crew supervised by the owner, who is the head installer, working on-site, every day.

Services

Our Waterloo office at 550 Parkside Drive provides us a central location for our pool services and new pool installations. Come in for a water test, pool chemicals or replacement pool parts from Hayward, Jacuzzi, and many others. We also carry a full range of pool equipment including pool cleaners, salt water systems, solar blankets, rollers, safety covers, as well as pumps and filters.

We Offer:

  • Seasonal pool openings & closings
  • Weekly pool maintenance service
  • Leak location and repair
  • Liner and coping replacements
  • Complete reconstruction of older pools
  • Custom safety cover installations
  • Pump, filter and heater repairs and replacement
  • Salt water system installation
  • Solar heating installation
  • Water testing

Our Team

Knowledgeable, professional, trained, experienced and friendly. You'll notice our dedicated staff returns to us year after year, giving you the best in service and reliability.

New Pools

Each pool installation is unique, and your pool will be designed with the features and accessories needed to create your perfect outdoor oasis. We start by listening to your needs, and develop a full plan for every element of your pool project. Our experience has shown that careful planning in the design stage makes the construction flow smoothly, leading to the timely completion of a well-crafted pool.

To construct your new Aquascapes pool, we use only the finest components from the best suppliers in the business. Our pool kits are from Kafko and Hayward supplies our circulation, filtration and control components. Aquascapes is committed to using the latest construction methods and techniques to ensure the highest quality and energy efficiency levels possible. Careful thought goes into equipment selection and plumbing design for each installation to provide the best water quality possible while using the least energy - keeping long-term operating costs low.

We pride ourselves on the fact that our past customers continue to refer Aquascapes to their friends and family. Contact us and experience the Aquascapes difference today.

Testimonials

Thank you for building us such a wonderful pool. We are already enjoying it so much. Your work is to be commended. You made it very easy for us. Your neatness, and keeping our yard in great order during the building process is greatly appreciated. Thank you once again,


- The Kennedy's

Thank you so much for an awesome job, the summer was great thanks to you and Aquascapes.


- Jane and Paul

Contact Us

If you need more information, have any general questions about pool maintenance, or would like to schedule an appointment to talk about a new pool installation - please don't hesitate to contact us.





Location

D2-550 Parkside Drive,
Waterloo, Ontario N2L 5V4

Store Hours

April-October: 9:00-6:00 Monday-Friday, 9:00-4:00 Saturday
November-March: 10:00-4:00 Tuesday, Thursday, 10:00-3:00 Saturday

Contact

Telephone: (519) 886-8751
Email: info@aquascapesrc.ca

Resources

Hayward warranty registration:
www.haywardcanada.com
Kafko warranty registration:
www.kafko.com
Poolwerx:
www.poolwerxfab.com

© Aquascapes Recreational Contractors 2009 | D2-550 Parkside Drive, Waterloo, Ontario N2L 5V4 | (519) 886-8751

metadata.title: Aquascapes Recreational Contractors
metadata.description: Pool design, installation and maintenance in Waterloo Ontario - Canada. We build high quality pools using the best materials and methods to suit our client's needs. We service the area of Kitchener, Waterloo, Cambridge, Guelph Ontario.
metadata.keywords: pool, installation, service, supplies, repairs, kitchener, waterloo, guelph, kafko, hayward, goldline, salt water pool, chlorinator, landscaping, leisurescapes, leak detection, pool leak, safety cover, pool cover, pool liner.

data.summary:
The content discusses the benefits of constructing a swimming pool in your backyard, emphasizing its ability to create an outdoor oasis for relaxation and family gatherings. Key points include:
- **Transforming Spaces**: Well-designed pools can enhance outdoor living with features like waterfalls and deck jets.
- **Family Engagement**: Pools provide opportunities for family bonding, play, and swimming lessons.
- **Social Hub**: Pools serve as safe gathering spots for children and their friends, offering peace of mind for parents.

Additionally, it introduces Aquascapes, a company specializing in pool construction, detailing their commitment to quality service, unique design processes, and maintenance offerings. The content also outlines their services, including seasonal maintenance and custom installations, while inviting potential customers to experience their installation difference.

formState.extractPrompt: Extract the company details, following the schema.
